message: Operation 'Register' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is too generic. Description is verbose and mixes procedural guidance with operational details. Reorganized to clearly state: authentication method, required inputs, return value, and side effects (auto-enable). Improved AI agent interpretability by separating what the operation does from how to use it.

data.current_description: This route allows VPN Admin user's with an api key to register a vpn user account. This route can only be called using your api key supplied to you from SimpliVPN. Before calling this you should use your api key to call the /UsernameAvailable route to make sure the username you want is available first. All subsequent user requests following can be done using the user's api token, their token's expire every 7 days, so you should occasionally check them and if you get unauthorized, refresh their token by calling /login route. This route will also auto-enable a new user.
data.summary_suggestion: Register new VPN user account with API key
data.description_suggestion: Registers a new VPN user account. Requires VPN Admin API key authentication. Input should include username and password (verify username availability via /username-available endpoint first). Returns a Bearer authentication token for the new user and auto-enables VPN access. User tokens expire after 7 days and must be refreshed via /login endpoint.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic. Description is verbose and mixes procedural guidance with operational details. Reorganized to clearly state: authentication method, required inputs, return value, and side effects (auto-enable). Improved AI agent interpretability by separating what the operation does from how to use it.

message: Operation 'Login' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity on inputs and mixes token management guidance with operation details. Reorganized to clearly specify: what inputs are required, what is returned, and token lifecycle. data.current_description: This route allows you to login a user. The response will give you a Bearer auth token to use with all rquests pertaining to the user. This token expires in 7 days, so for every request you should check if you get an unauthorized responsve and re-validate the login if needed.
data.summary_suggestion: Authenticate user and obtain Bearer token
data.description_suggestion: Authenticates a user with credentials and returns a Bearer authentication token. Input requires username and password. Returns a Bearer token valid for 7 days. Token must be refreshed by calling this endpoint again when expired or if unauthorized responses are received.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity on inputs and mixes token management guidance with operation details. Reorganized to clearly specify: what inputs are required, what is returned, and token lifecycle. Fixed typo ('rquests' -> 'requests', 'responsve' -> 'responses'). Improved AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: This route allows you to enable a user's vpn access. This route can only be called using your user's Bearer Auth token.
data.description_suggestion: Enables VPN access for a user account. Requires Bearer token authentication. Input should specify the target user identifier. Returns confirmation of the user's enabled status. Side effect: User gains immediate VPN connectivity access.
data.reasoning: Summary uses PascalCase which is inconsistent with domain terminology. Description lacks input/output details and doesn't clarify what 'enable' means operationally.
